description: Decision Boundary Card for Sub-Centre Mind — defines what Gemma 4 E4B answers, refuses, and escalates

answerable.query: IFA tablet dose for pregnant women

answerable.expected_answer: Minimum 4 visits: 1st trimester, 2nd trimester, 7th month, 9th month

answerable.query: TT injection schedule for pregnant women
answerable.expected_answer: TT1 at first contact, TT2 after 4 weeks
Bleeding, severe headache, blurred vision, convulsions, high fever, reduced fetal movement
500mg elemental calcium daily from 14-20 weeks until delivery
400 mcg daily, ideally from pre-conception through first trimester
BCG, OPV0, Hep B0 at birth; DPT, OPV, Hep B at 6, 10, 14 weeks; measles at 9-12 months
6 months exclusive breastfeeding, continue with complementary foods up to 2 years
After 6 months of age, continue breastfeeding
9 doses from 9 months to 5 years (every 6 months)
Within 24 hours, 3 days, 7 days, 6 weeks after delivery
Minimum 3 years between pregnancies for maternal and child health

refusals.reason: Blood pressure interpretation requires Medical Officer assessment
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: BP reading 140/90 requires clinical interpretation

refusals.query: How much insulin for gestational diabetes?
refusals.reason: Insulin dosing requires physician prescription and monitoring
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Gestational diabetes insulin dosing request

refusals.reason: Bleeding assessment requires immediate clinical evaluation
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Heavy bleeding assessment needed — potential emergency

refusals.reason: TB diagnosis requires sputum testing and physician evaluation
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Suspected TB case requires diagnostic workup

refusals.reason: Rash diagnosis requires clinical examination by physician
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Rash assessment needed, possible measles

refusals.reason: Lab result interpretation and severity grading requires Medical Officer
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Hemoglobin 8 g/dL interpretation and management

refusals.query: Can I give paracetamol for fever?
refusals.reason: Medication dosing requires physician guidance, especially for pregnant women
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Paracetamol dosing for fever

refusals.reason: Neonatal jaundice assessment requires physician evaluation
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Suspected neonatal jaundice requires assessment

refusals.reason: Delivery mode decision requires obstetrician evaluation
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Potential C-section indication requires obstetric assessment

refusals.reason: Diabetes diagnosis requires physician interpretation of lab results and clinical context
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Blood sugar 180 mg/dL interpretation needed

refusals.reason: IV fluid administration requires physician order and monitoring
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: IV fluid administration request

refusals.reason: Eclampsia diagnosis requires immediate physician evaluation and emergency management

refusals.query: Should I stop breastfeeding for medication?
refusals.reason: Medication safety during breastfeeding requires physician assessment
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Breastfeeding safety with maternal medication

refusals.reason: Proteinuria interpretation requires physician evaluation for preeclampsia risk
refusals.escalation_message: ANM query: Positive urine protein requires assessment

vision_use_cases.label: Printed protocol / poster — read text
vision_use_cases.behaviour: OCR the visible text verbatim. No interpretation. Optionally feed extracted text into RAG to surface grounded protocol citations.
vision_use_cases.boundary_note: Vision OCR only. Text returned is verbatim; no clinical interpretation.

vision_use_cases.label: Medicine packet — read brand & dose
vision_use_cases.behaviour: Extract visible brand / generic / dose strength as a list. Always end with: 'Decision required from Medical Officer.'
vision_use_cases.boundary_note: Sub-Centre Mind does not authorize dosing or administration.

vision_use_cases.label: ANC / RCH register row — extract fields
vision_use_cases.behaviour: Extract visible 'field: value' pairs as a draft. ANM must verify against the original register before any use.
vision_use_cases.boundary_note: Draft fields only — no clinical interpretation, no inference of diagnoses.

vision_refusals.reason: Diagnostic interpretation of medical images is outside the boundary of Sub-Centre Mind. ANM must escalate physical examination findings to a qualified clinician.
Photos of patients themselves are not handled. Use printed protocol pages, medicine packs, or register rows only.

asr.rationale: Ollama 0.22.x lists Gemma 4 audio capability but does not yet expose it via a stable API field; local Whisper preserves the all-on-device story.
